---
title: "Likes and Dislikes, or, Some Passages in the Life of Emily Marsden"
---

## Likes and Dislikes, or, Some Passages in the Life of Emily Marsden

**Author:** Anna Butler
**Date:** 1858
**Imprint:** London: John W. Parker

### Notes

This novel was originally serialized in the <i>MP</i> (July 1855-November 1856).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
